about.title: About Us
about.tagline: Empowering small businesses to sell online
about.whoP1: Flomerce is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform built to help small businesses, entrepreneurs, and creators launch their own professional e-commerce websites — without writing a single line of code. We believe that every business, no matter how small, deserves a powerful online presence.
about.whoP2: Based in Karwar, Karnataka, India, Flomerce was founded with a simple mission: make online selling accessible, affordable, and effortless for everyone.
about.whatIntro: Flomerce provides a complete, all-in-one platform for creating and managing online stores. Each store gets its own branded subdomain (e.g., your-store.{{domain}}) and comes packed with everything needed to run a successful e-commerce business:

storeBuilder.label: Store Builder
storeBuilder.desc: Create a fully functional online store in minutes with beautiful, ready-to-use templates

productMgmt.label: Product Management
productMgmt.desc: Add products with images, categories, variants, pricing, and inventory tracking

orderProcessing.label: Order Processing
orderProcessing.desc: Complete order lifecycle management — from placement to delivery, with real-time status updates and customer notifications

securePayments.label: Secure Payments
securePayments.desc: Accept payments through Razorpay (UPI, cards, net banking, wallets) and cash on delivery

customerMgmt.label: Customer Management
customerMgmt.desc: Built-in customer accounts, wishlists, order history, and reviews

analytics.label: Analytics & Insights
analytics.desc: Track visitors, page views, traffic sources, and sales from your admin dashboard

seoTools.label: SEO Tools
seoTools.desc: Built-in search engine optimization with meta tags, sitemaps, and Google structured data

pushNotif.label: Push Notifications
pushNotif.desc: Engage customers with automated alerts for new products, price drops, and back-in-stock items

customDomains.label: Custom Domains
customDomains.desc: Connect your own domain name for a fully branded experience

about.missionP1: We are on a mission to democratize e-commerce for small businesses across India and beyond. Traditional e-commerce solutions are often expensive, complex, and require technical expertise. Flomerce eliminates these barriers by providing an intuitive, affordable platform that anyone can use.
about.missionP2: Whether you sell jewellery, clothing, beauty products, or any other retail goods — Flomerce gives you the tools to build your brand, reach customers, and grow your business online.

signUp.label: Sign Up
signUp.desc: Create your free account in seconds — no credit card required

buildStore.label: Build Your Store
buildStore.desc: Choose a template, add your brand name, logo, and products

setupPayments.label: Set Up Payments
setupPayments.desc: Connect your own Razorpay merchant account to accept payments directly

goLive.label: Go Live
goLive.desc: Your store is instantly live on your own subdomain, ready for customers

simplicity.label: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: We build tools that are easy to use, so you can focus on your business, not technology

transparency.label: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear pricing, no hidden fees, and honest communication

security.label: Security
security.desc: Your data and your customers' data are protected with industry-standard security measures

support.label: Support
support.desc: We are here to help you succeed — reach out to us anytime

about.contactIntro: We would love to hear from you. Whether you have questions, feedback, or need help getting started:
